vectors.name: grant-redeem-valid
vectors.desc: Full happy-path offline redemption: fresh grant, live cnonce, app-signed proof.

vectors.name: grant-stale-clock
vectors.desc: Controller offline (no gateway clock sync) > 14 days: refuse redemption entirely.

vectors.name: grant-lockdown
vectors.desc: Offline grants are refused during lockdown.

vectors.name: grant-badsig
vectors.desc: Grant signed by a key that is not the pinned gateway key.

vectors.name: grant-expired
vectors.desc: Grant exp + 90 s is in the past.

vectors.name: grant-wrong-device
vectors.desc: This controller is not in grant.devices.

vectors.name: grant-wrong-access-point
vectors.desc: Requested access point is not in grant.access_points.

vectors.name: grant-window-denied
vectors.desc: Grant limited to mon-fri 08:00-17:00 (UTC); redemption attempted Sunday 10:00 UTC.

vectors.name: grant-window-accepted
vectors.desc: Same mon-fri 08:00-17:00 window, redeemed Thursday 09:00 UTC: inside.

vectors.name: grant-proof-badsig
vectors.desc: Proof signed by a key other than grant.app_pubkey.

vectors.name: grant-proof-wrong-grant
vectors.desc: proof.grant_id does not match the presented grant.

vectors.name: grant-cnonce-expired
vectors.desc: Proof arrives after the 30 s challenge validity.

vectors.name: grant-proof-stale-ts
vectors.desc: proof.ts more than 90 s behind the controller clock.

vectors.name: grant-cnonce-replay
vectors.desc: Same proof presented twice for one issued cnonce; second attempt rejected.
